task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to the confluence of the Ohio and Mississippi rivers near Cairo, Illinois.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows the geographic meeting point of two major rivers (Ohio and Mississippi) near a town (Cairo).

task_completion.description: Agent opens the 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'New Placemark' or 'Google Earth - New Placemark' (or similar) is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the specific name 'Ohio-Mississippi Confluence' into the name field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the placemark dialog contains the exact text 'Ohio-Mississippi Confluence'.

task_completion.description: Agent includes coordinate information in the placemark description field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the placemark dialog contains numerical text resembling latitude/longitude coordinates (e.g., 36.98, -89.13).

task_completion.description: The placemark pin is visually positioned exactly where the two rivers meet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The yellow pushpin (or marker icon) is located at the southern tip of the land mass where the Ohio and Mississippi rivers merge.

task_completion.description: The placemark is saved and visible in the 'My Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sidebar (Places panel) lists 'Ohio-Mississippi Confluence' under the 'My Places' folder structure.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the mapping software GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mapping application interface (e.g., Google Earth) being used, with no terminal or command prompt windows active for data injection.

integrity.description: Agent performs the task within the mapping application, not by editing a KML/text file externally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window is the mapping software, not a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) writing XML/KML code manually.

integrity.description: Agent manually enters data into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or pasting specific values into the Name/Description fields of the dialog box, rather than importing a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Confluence of Ohio and Mississippi rivers, South of Cairo, IL (approx 36.98°N, 89.13°W). Expected Name: 'Ohio-Mississippi Confluence'. The description field must contain numerical coordinates.
